     The Numbers Business Report

Tenet (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,473,550Details
International Box Office $306,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $366,273,550
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,638,546
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $21,548,965
Total $28,187,511
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Armed with only one word—Tenet—and fighting for the survival of the entire world, the Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time. Not time travel. Inversion.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,001,852 (33.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:16.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$205,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,810 opening theaters/2,930 max. theaters, 9.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $77,187,866

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 3rd, 2020 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
September 3rd, 2020 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
February 23rd, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
February 23rd, 2024 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: August 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Germany)
August 26th, 2020 (Wide) (South Korea)
August 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Poland)
August 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Italy)
August 26th, 2020 (Wide) (Turkey)
Video Release: December 15th, 2020 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence and action, some suggestive references and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2635 (Cert #52735), 6/24/2020)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Unnamed Character
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: C.I.A., False Identity, Rescue, Surprise Twist, Terrorism, Time Travel, Tortured for Information
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Syncopy, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
